cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the author did when he met Mr. Lee. Let me go through the passage again to find the relevant part. So, he didn't pay attention to Mr. Lee. After passing Mr. Lee, his mother told him not to do that again. So the author didn't greet Mr. Lee or talk to him. The answer would be that he ignored him.
